Localization.Description: A virtual machine template is imported or exported

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: Failed to import virtual machine template "{object.name}" on host {event_src.host}
Virtual machine template "{object.name}" is being imported on host {event_src.host}
Failed to export virtual machine template "{object.name}" on host {event_src.host}
Virtual machine template "{object.name}" is imported on host {event_src.host}
Virtual machine template "{object.name}" is being exported on host {event_src.host}
Virtual machine template "{object.name}" is exported on host {event_src.host}
